prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低位次分别为约9985名、9768名、11323名、6808名、6375名。2023年出现明显后移（11323名），但2024–2025年连续两年大幅前移，累计前移约4948名；2025年基准位次约6375名，为近五年最高水平；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为19人，2026年计划仍为19人，连续六年持平，无扩招或缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学（宣城校区）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名（与本部合并）2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在第79–83名区间，属中上水平理工类院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用他人作品参赛被开除），对报考心理有一定抑制；2025年声誉亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖音综合热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量偏低。历史投档异常记录显示2025年该校热门专业投档线暴跌，部分专业无人报考，但属低关注信号；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）与本部共享学科评估，管理科学与工程为A级，是该校唯一A-及以上学科；机械工程、电气工程等工科专业为传统优势方向，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年高热推荐）；机械/智能制造类热度分化。天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年（71938人）增加约10062人，增幅约14%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于安徽省宣城市，在天津市招生计划仅19人，占比较小；天津考生对异地211工科院校的报考意愿近年呈增强趋势，2024–2025年位次连续前移即为佐证。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次连续两年大幅前移的趋势、2026年招生计划持平、天津市考生总数大幅增加约14%导致竞争加剧，以及声誉偏负面对报考热度的轻微抑制，在2025年基准6375名基础上预计竞争继续加剧，位次进一步前移。预测最低位次约6345名，区间5845–6845名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程与智能控制（宣城校区）
- 软件工程（宣城校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械工程（宣城校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 英语（宣城校区；外语语种。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5845–6845名内，建议以二档机械工程为主力、一档电气工程与智能控制和软件工程为冲刺目标、三档英语为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（5845名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（6845名附近）建议以二档为主、三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Tianjin comprehensive subjects were approximately 9985, 9768, 11323, 6808, and 6375 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (11323), but in 2024–2025, there was a continuous and substantial forward shift, accumulating a forward movement of about 4948 places; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 6375, the highest in the past five years; the university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Tianjin was 19 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 19 students, unchanged for six consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, providing no direct relief to the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (combined with the main campus), it ranks approximately 80th, with recent rankings stable in the 79–83 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of science and engineering institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving an academic misconduct incident (a student was expelled for plagiarizing others' works in a competition), which has a certain dampening effect on application psychology; the 2025 reputation was also somewhat negative (hot major admission scores plummeted); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 77th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure. Historical admission anomaly records show that in 2025, the university's hot major admission scores plummeted, with some majors having no applicants, but this is a low-attention signal; Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) shares discipline evaluations with the main campus, with Management Science and Engineering rated A, the only A- or above discipline; mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors are traditional strengths, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electrical engineering and automation, electronic information/communications, and other engineering majors have consistently high social popularity (highly recommended in 2024); mechanical/intelligent manufacturing majors have diverging popularity. In 2026, the total number of Tianjin college entrance exam takers is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 from 2025 (71,938), a growth of about 14%, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, with only 19 enrollment slots in Tianjin, a small proportion; Tianjin examinees' willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 engineering universities has shown an increasing trend in recent years, as evidenced by the continuous forward shift in rankings from 2024 to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of continuous and significant forward shifts in historical rankings over the past two years, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 14% increase in Tianjin examinees leading to intensified competition, and the slight suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation, competition is expected to continue intensifying based on the 2025 baseline of 6375, with rankings moving further forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6345, with a range of 5845–6845.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control (Xuancheng Campus)
- Software Engineering (Xuancheng Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- English (Xuancheng Campus; foreign language).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 5845–6845, it is recommended to take Tier 2 Mechanical Engineering as the main target, Tier 1 Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control and Software Engineering as stretch goals, and Tier 3 English as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 5845), focus on Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is near the upper bound (around 6845), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 with Tier 3 as a safety.
